title: Four Eyes
description: Allows players to read book titles of books inside chiseled bookshelves by looking at them.
body:
# 📖Four Eyes📖 Four Eyes is a plugin that displays book titles from a chiseled bookshelf when the player looks at them. It will display the book title in the player's action bar. It works for signed books, named books, and enchanted books. ![Shows a Minecraft player looking at a row of chiseled bookshelves and the title of the book they are looking at is displayed in the player's action bar. The book title is Wiggling with the Warden: A Deeper and Darker Romance Novel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gI22h7WU/images/aca80ac497cf70b6af260cd4279b93f2f7dd495b.png)
Shoutout to TitoSmooth for the book title!
